title: poa ligulata var. djurdjurae
intro: Poa ligulata var. djurdjurae, also known as the Djurdjura Poa, is a rare and endemic variety of grass that is native to the island of Corsica. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Poa ligulata var. djurdjurae include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
